rationale: Documentation bug: wrong type (bson_iter_t* vs bson_iter_t) in parsing docs example. No spec behavior involved.
Build failure with LibreSSL on Gentoo; cmake include_directories given empty string. Build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Improvement to support LibreSSL 2.7+ OpenSSL 1.1 API. Build/TLS integration improvement, no spec deviation.
SDAM monitoring spec requires duration on heartbeat events; structs had uninitialized duration fields violating spec.
Test cert directory duplication cleanup. Internal test organization, no spec behavior involved.
Transactions spec: readConcern/writeConcern/readPreference must inherit from client; driver overwrites with empty opts instead.
API improvement adding bson_iter_overwrite for ObjectId/timestamp/datetime. Requested by Swift driver; no spec rule violated.
cmake find_package uses incorrect path on Ubuntu 18. Packaging bug, no spec behavior involved.
Modifying change stream output examples per DRIVERS-537 coordination ticket; spec test YAML update, not a driver behavior fix.
Documentation improvement to encourage CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release in install guide. Docs change, no spec behavior.
Evergreen CI task to test install/uninstall on Visual Studio builds. CI infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Heap buffer overflow in libbson when parsing malformed/corrupted BSON. Memory safety bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Build compilation failure on Windows with ENABLE_SRV=OFF; missing netdb.h include. Build issue, no spec behavior.
Modulemap files missing from release archive causing cmake failure. Packaging/release issue, no spec behavior.
Build automation improvement: generate VERSION_CURRENT dynamically. Internal build tooling, no spec behavior.
Fix placement of header include guards to prevent accidental direct inclusion. Internal C header hygiene, no spec behavior.
make install fails for unprivileged users due to cmake install path issue. Packaging bug, no spec behavior.
Deprecating bson_oid_init_sequence API with no apparent value. API deprecation, no spec rule involved.
Retryable writes spec explicitly quoted: 'MUST NOT add txnNumber' to multi-document writes; driver added txnNumber to deleteMany/updateMany.
URI parsing silently logs warning instead of setting bson_error_t for invalid option values. C API ergonomics bug, not a spec rule violation.
Build reproducibility: remove timestamp from generated uninstall script header. Build artifact issue, no spec behavior.
Transactions spec quoted: 'MUST override all other...readConcerns with transaction's readConcern'; driver used collection's readConcern instead.
Stack overflow on deeply nested BSON; resolved as adding a documentation example for depth validation. No spec rule violated.
TLS SecTransform hangs indefinitely with invalid cert path on Darwin. Implementation hang, no spec-defined behavior violated.
Coverity static analysis: integer overflow in GridFS chunk calculation. Internal arithmetic bug, no spec rule violated.
Coverity static analysis: unchecked return value from bson_iter_init in GridFS. Internal safety fix, no spec rule violated.
Removing redundant placeholder logic between allow_placeholders flag and convert_message_for_test in spec test runner.
DNS auth spec tests fail due to missing user setup in test runner's mongo-orchestration config. CI/test runner issue.
Internal refactoring: parse GridFS options using existing IDL-based generate-opts.py scripts. No behavior change.
Adding spec test per DRIVERS-576 coordination ticket: reads must ignore db/collection readConcern in transactions.
CI improvement: run auth tests under valgrind in authentication-tests-memcheck Evergreen task. No spec behavior.
CI improvement: implement or remove TODO for running unittests with valgrind. No spec behavior.
CI configuration refactoring: split and generate Evergreen config.yml to reduce duplication. No spec behavior.
Private header files missing from release tarball causing build failure when GSSAPI enabled. Packaging issue.
GSSAPI auth CI tests failing after packaging fix on macOS. Test environment/CI issue, not driver behavior violation.
cmake 3.3/3.4 missing cmake_parse_arguments native command; make dist fails. Build system version compatibility bug.
Fixing inconsistent abort-vs-return behavior in match_bson_with_ctx spec test runner utility function.
Internal refactoring: generate change stream option parsing with IDL scripts for consistency. No behavior change.
API improvement: expose lastUpdateTime from server description for wrapping drivers. No spec violation, additive API change.
API addition: public va_list variant of bson_copy_to_excluding_noinit requested by Swift driver. No spec violation.
OP_MSG bitFlags not byte-swapped on big-endian zSeries; wire protocol spec requires correct endian encoding of all message fields.
Extended JSON spec defines datetime millisecond format; driver outputs spaces instead of zero-padding milliseconds in relaxed JSON.
cmake ENABLE_SASL=AUTO incorrectly defaults to CYRUS on Windows. Build configuration default bug, no spec behavior.
Remove dead/incomplete GSSAPI code never fully implemented; no user-visible behavior change. Internal cleanup.
Resync read/write concern YAML spec tests per DRIVERS-567 coordination ticket to add new read concern levels.
Packaging conflict: same uninstall script path for libbson-only vs full mongo-c-driver install. Packaging bug, no spec behavior.
Internal refactoring of SDAM background thread startup/shutdown logic; cleanup with no behavior change per spec.
CI task update: run DNS auth tests against MongoDB 4 due to mongo-orchestration issues on Windows. CI configuration.
Evergreen tests failing on release branch due to 'latest' server version config; CI configuration fix only.
APM callbacks not registered for clients from try_pop; command monitoring spec requires events for all commands on all clients.
